findings.title: Python Except Bare
findings.description: Bare except clause catches all exceptions including SystemExit, KeyboardInterrupt, and GeneratorExit. Use except Exception: to catch only standard exceptions, or catch specific exception types.

findings.title: Sql Concat Python
findings.description: SQL query built with string concatenation or f-string in Python. Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT ... WHERE id = %s', (value,))
